differential_diagnoses: Small-vessel vasculitis secondary to infection (e.g., post-streptococcal)
next_steps: Urinalysis to check for hematuria or proteinuria
Complete blood count with differential and inflammatory markers (CRP, ESR)
Dermatology consultation for consideration of skin biopsy (H&E and DIF)
Serum chemistries including renal function and albumin
Empiric antibiotics for suspected meningococcemia pending cultures
